conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'm starting a new web app. I need to pick a frontend framework. I've been going back and forth between React and Vue.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My team knows React better, but I personally prefer Vue's syntax.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: After thinking about it more, I'll go with React since the team velocity matters more than my personal preference.

query: What frontend framework did the user decide to use for their new web app?
